steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The second sentence gives concrete, documented proof of Chaucer's pioneering role. The specific examples (2,000+ first-used words) support and strengthen the claim just made.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
”In fact” introduces evidence that backs up a prior claim.
However and On the contrary wrongly introduce contrast; Besides wrongly suggests a separate point. That matches choice C — C is correct.
